notes: Classification fields are intentionally blank in markdown for human review.
Sampling is deterministic for a seed and starts at a seeded edge primary-key range, wrapping once if needed.
production_test_mock_context is inferred from relation/path/id text because context is not first-class in the current edge schema.

manual_review.basis: bounded sampled source snippets plus stored exactness/source-span/provenance/context metadata
